详解","icon":"🔧"},{"title":"KAIROS","href":"/assistant","description":"持久助手模式","icon":"🤖"},{"title":"插件系统","href":"/plugins","description":"扩展机制","icon":"🔌"}],"children":[["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"多智能体架构概述","subtitle":"Coordinator-Worker 分层编排模型"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["Claude Code 的 Coordinator 模式实现了"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"多 Agent 编排"}]," ","能力。在这个架构中，一个 Coordinator Agent 作为中央管理者，负责将复杂任务分解为子任务， 分配给多个 Worker Agent 并行执行，最后汇总所有结果。这种模式使得 Claude Code 能够 应对大规模、高复杂度的工程任务。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Coordinator 与 Worker 之间通过明确的通信协议协作。Coordinator 拥有管理类工具 （任务创建、团队管理、消息路由），而 Worker 则使用执行类工具（文件读写、命令执行、代码搜索）， 形成分层分权的协作体系。"}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"Coordinator-Worker 架构","nodes":[{"id":"coordinator","label":"Coordinator Agent","x":330,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"worker1","label":"Worker Agent 1","x":80,"y":160,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"worker2","label":"Worker Agent c:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"协调器模式","subtitle":"管理工具与执行工具的分层设计"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["Coordinator 拥有与 Worker 完全不同的工具集。Coordinator 使用"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"管理工具"}]," ","进行任务分解、分配和进度监控，而 Worker 使用"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"执行工具"}]," ","进行文件读写、命令执行和代码搜索。这种分层设计确保了职责清晰，避免了 Worker 越权操作。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Coordinator 负责四个核心职责：将复杂任务分解为可独立执行的子任务、将子任务 分配给最合适的 Worker Agent、监控各 Worker 的执行进度、以及汇总所有结果并生成最终输出。"}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"Coordinator vs Worker (Worker)",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-2 d:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"Worker Agent 生命周期","subtitle":"从创建到终止的完整流程"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"每个 Worker Agent 都经历一个完整的生命周期：从 Coordinator 使用 AgentTool 生成， 接收具体子任务，使用执行工具完成任务，通过 SendMessage 返回结果，最终由 Coordinator 终止。这个过程是高度结构化的，每一步都有明确的输入和输出。"}]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"Worker Agent 生命周期流程","nodes":[{"id":"create","label":"1. 创建","x":10,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"assign","label":"2. e:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"任务管理","subtitle":"TaskCreate / TaskUpdate / TaskList 全流程"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["任务管理是 Coordinator 模式的核心基础设施。通过"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"TaskCreate"}]," ","创建任务、"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"TaskUpdate"}]," ","更新状态、"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"TaskList"}]," ","查看全局进度，Coordinator 可以精确地编排多个 Worker 的执行顺序。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["任务之间可以建立"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"依赖和阻塞关系"}],"。一个任务可以被标记为阻塞其他任务，使得后续任务必须等待前置任务完成后才能开始。 这种机制确保了任务按正确的依赖顺序执行，避免数据竞争和逻辑错误。"]}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"任务生命周期与依赖管理","nodes":[{"id":"tc1","label":"TaskCreate","x":30,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"task1","label":"任务1: \"分析工具\"","x":30,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"tu1","label":"TaskUpdate","x":30,"y":200,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"tc2","label":"TaskCreate","x":250,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"task2","label":"任务2: \"编写文档\"","x":250,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"tu2_dep","label":"TaskUpdate\nblockedBy: [1]","x":250,"y":200,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"tl","label":"TaskList","x":470,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"progress","label":"全局进度面板","x":470,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"done1","label":"任务1 10:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"通信机制","subtitle":"SendMessage 点对点与广播通信"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["Agent 间的通信是 Coordinator 模式的神经网络。"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"SendMessage"}]," ","工具支持两种通信模式："," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"点对点通信"}],"（发送给指定 Agent） 和"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"广播通信"}],"（发送给所有团队成员）。 消息会自动投递到目标 Agent，无需主动轮询。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"消息投递是异步的。当目标 Agent 正忙于执行任务时，消息会被排队等待， 直到当前任务完成后才处理。这种设计避免了 Agent 被频繁打断， 保证了任务执行的连贯性。"}]]}],["$","$Lb",null,{"title":"通信模式：点对点 vs 广播","nodes":[{"id":"coord","label":"Coordinator","x":300,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"p2p_label","label":"点对点通信","x":100,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"broadcast_label","label":"广播通信","x":460,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"w1","label":"Worker \"agent-name\""}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":"发送给指定的单个 Agent。适用于任务分配、结果汇报、指令调整等场景。消息只有目标 Agent 能收到。"}]]}],["$","div","广播通信",{"className":"p-5 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] bg-[var(--card-bg)]","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-2
